# INFINI Loadgen | The Best Open Source Golang Load Testing Tool for Easysearch/Elasticsearch/OpenSearch

> AI-friendly index of site content.

## Core Content
- [Installation](https://docs.infinilabs.com/loadgen/main/docs/getting-started/install/): Installation #  INFINI Loadgen is a single-binary executable with no external dependencies. Supports Linux / macOS / Windows.
Automatic Install (Recommended) #  curl -sSL http://get.infini.cloud | …
- [Quick Start](https://docs.infinilabs.com/loadgen/main/docs/getting-started/concepts/): Quick Start #  Get Loadgen running in 5 minutes — understand the core workflow and run your first test.
Core Files #  Loadgen requires only two files to run:
   File Purpose     loadgen.yml Global …
- [Reference](https://docs.infinilabs.com/loadgen/main/docs/getting-started/reference/): Reference #  Complete reference for all Loadgen configuration options.
 Command-Line Arguments #  loadgen [options]    Argument Type Default Description     -run string loadgen.dsl Path to DSL test …
- [Examples](https://docs.infinilabs.com/loadgen/main/docs/getting-started/examples/): Examples #  Practical examples organized by use case. Each example can be copied and run directly.
 1. Bulk Write Benchmarking #  Goal: Evaluate write throughput, cluster load, and queue pressure.
# …
